title: Steam Casing Correction [GregTech Modern]
description: Retexture steam machine casings and bricked hulls to use vanilla bricks
body:
The recipes for Steam Machine Casings and Bricked Bronze/Steel Hulls in GregTech Modern use vanilla bricks for the recipes, but the textures use firebricks instead. This pack changes the texture to use vanilla bricks instead.

A variant for [Cosmic Frontiers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/cosmic-frontiers) versions 0.7.x and below is also downloadable [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/steam-casing-correction/version/1.0-CF)

![A preview of the Steam Grinder with the old and new textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2eeea071622a28a498af13296e4334ecf1d9019.png)
![A preview of the steam casings and bricked hulls with the new textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9517e3e09fea85e64227ec359d14c3dcedf646a5.png)
